Module com.bifasico.soduko

Package com.bifasico.soduko.model

package com.bifasico.soduko.model
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.bifasico.soduko
     
    com.bifasico.soduko.controller
     
    com.bifasico.soduko.view
     
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Board
    Represents the root node of the Sudoku board tree structure.
    BoardGenerator
    Generates a valid, randomized Sudoku solution for a Board using an iterative backtracking algorithm driven by a SudokuStack.
    BoardManager
    Coordinates the active game state: board tree, generation, hints, and undo history.
    Cell
    Represents a single cell in the Sudoku board.
    HintProvider
    Provides hint suggestions to the player by finding an empty cell that can be filled with a valid number according to Sudoku rules.
    Launcher
     
    Region
    Represents a 2×3 region (block) in the Sudoku board.
    SudokuStack<T>
    A generic stack data structure implemented from scratch without external libraries.
